'''Eyma''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] from [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. He was a member of the [[Civilian Protection Guild]]. He was an enemy of the [[Ghrag Mercenaries]] and often sent out [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] to deal with them.

Eyma was involved in the recapture of a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in Kashyyyk space, that was stolen by the Ghrag during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. He sent a group of spacers to recapture the corvette, and return it to orbit around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The spacers were successful, and he awarded them with an [[Emperor's Royal Guard TIE/IN starfighter]], an advanced [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]], and a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vaksai]].

==Behind the scenes==
Eyma appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
